hero.question: Can I get through today?

proximity.near: You're very close to the perimeter
proximity.safe: Your area is not directly affected

hero.geo_denied: Enable location to check if your area is affected
hero.geo_unavailable: Your device does not support geolocation

why_closed.title: Why are the streets closed?
why_closed.body: The Mexico City Public Safety Secretariat (SSC CDMX) implements the Última Milla Operation on match days at Estadio Ciudad de México. This operation establishes a ~1.6 km security perimeter around the stadium, with restricted access for ticket holders, accredited personnel, or residents with a Digital Pass issued by Alcaldía Coyoacán.

ticket.label: I have a match ticket
ticket.body: Show your ticket at perimeter checkpoints. Access is granted toward the stadium.

resident.label: I live in the area
resident.body: You must obtain the Digital Pass (Tarjetón Digital) from Alcaldía Coyoacán. It's free and issued for neighborhoods inside the Última Milla Polygon.

work.label: I need to work or study there
work.body: Businesses and schools inside the perimeter may continue normal operations. Bring ID and proof of your activity in the area.

transit.label: I use public transit
transit.body: The Metro (Line 2, Tasqueña station) and Metrobús operate with route adjustments. Check the Metro CDMX app for alternative routes on match days.

footer.fallback_warning: Using fallback data — official sources unavailable
